raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Department of Housing and Community Development has awarded the counties of San Bernardino and Riverside funds from the CalHome program totaling $3,758,000.",
    "The awarded grants will benefit first-time homebuyers or homeowners.",
    "Affordability hampers Californians' ability to buy a home and stay in a home.",
    "CalHome awards grants to local public agencies or nonprofits to fund local programs to assist low- and very low-income households in becoming or remaining homeowners.",
    "Neighborhood Partnership Housing Services, Inc in San Bernardino County received $2,498,000 to support the First-Time Homebuyer Program and Owner-Occupied Rehabilitation Program.",
    "Habitat for Humanity Inland Valley in Riverside County received $1,260,000 to support the Owner-Occupied Rehabilitation Program."
  ]
}
```
